service: enrichment-engine
description: Severity uplift and historical correlation rules for normalized alerts processed by SentinelOps enrichment-engine
updated_at: 2026-03-20T09:18:00Z
owner_team: soc-platform-detection
applies_to_topics:
  consume: [alerts.raw]
  produce: [alerts.enriched]
correlation_state:
  backend: redis
  ttl_seconds_default: 21600
  key_prefix: enrichment:correlation
search_backend:
  engine: opensearch
  cluster: sentinelops-sec-events
  index_patterns:
    alerts: sentinelops-alerts-*
    timelines: sentinelops-timelines-*
system_of_record:
  database: sentinelops_core
  audit_topic: audit.events
defaults:
  severity_scale: [informational, low, medium, high, critical]
  confidence_scale: [low, medium, high]
  baseline_severity: medium
  baseline_confidence: medium
  max_severity: critical
  max_confidence: high
  require_tenant_scope: true
  require_correlation_id: true
  write_audit_on_change: true
  visible_latency_budget_seconds: 60
  legal_hold_blocks_artifact_expiry: true
lookback_windows:
  short_burst: 15m
  analyst_triage: 1h
  active_incident: 4h
  historical_context: 24h
  repeat_offender: 7d
  campaign_window: 30d
field_aliases:
  tenant_id: [tenant_id, tenant.id]
  alert_id: [alert_id, event.id]
  source_type: [source.type, source_type]
  source_product: [source.product, source_product]
  host_id: [asset.host_id, host.id, endpoint.id]
  hostname: [asset.hostname, host.name]
  user_id: [identity.user_id, user.id, principal.id]
  username: [identity.username, user.name, principal.name]
  ip_address: [src.ip, source.ip, network.src_ip]
  destination_ip: [dst.ip, destination.ip, network.dst_ip]
  file_hash: [file.sha256, artifact.sha256, malware.sha256]
  process_name: [process.name, endpoint.process_name]
  tactic: [mitre.tactic, attack.tactic]
  technique: [mitre.technique, attack.technique]
  case_id: [case.id, linked_case_id]
severity_transitions:
  informational: {uplift_one_step: low, uplift_two_steps: medium}
  low: {uplift_one_step: medium, uplift_two_steps: high}
  medium: {uplift_one_step: high, uplift_two_steps: critical}
  high: {uplift_one_step: critical, uplift_two_steps: critical}
  critical: {uplift_one_step: critical, uplift_two_steps: critical}
global_conditions:
  suppress_if_status_in: [closed_false_positive, duplicate_closed]
  skip_uplift_if_tags_present: [allowlisted_asset, approved_red_team]
  require_searchable_document: true
  require_tenant_partition_filter: true
rules:
  - id: corr-001-repeat-host-high-volume
    enabled: true
    name: Repeat alerts on same host within short burst
    match: {all: [{field: host_id, exists: true}, {field: source_type, in: [edr, siem, ndr]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, host_id]
    lookback: 15m
    threshold: {count_gte: 7}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [repeated_host_activity, burst_correlation]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: ">=5 alerts on same host within 15m", correlation_scope: host}
    audit: {event_type: alert.severity_uplifted}
  - id: corr-002-repeat-user-auth-failures
    enabled: true
    name: Repeated identity alerts for same user
    match: {all: [{field: user_id, exists: true}, {field: source_product, in: [keycloak, okta, azure-ad, iam]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, user_id]
    lookback: 1h
    threshold: {count_gte: 8}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [repeated_identity_risk]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: ">=8 identity alerts for same user within 1h", correlation_scope: user}
  - id: corr-003-host-and-user-linked
    enabled: true
    name: Same host and user seen together across alerts
    match: {all: [{field: host_id, exists: true}, {field: user_id, exists: true}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, host_id, user_id]
    lookback: 4h
    threshold: {count_gte: 3}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [host_user_pair_recurrence]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "same host/user pair observed >=3 times in 4h"}
  - id: corr-004-multi-source-confirmation
    enabled: true
    name: Multi-source confirmation for same indicator
    match: {any: [{field: ip_address, exists: true}, {field: file_hash, exists: true}, {field: host_id, exists: true}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, ip_address, file_hash, host_id]
    lookback: 1h
    threshold: {distinct_field: source_product, distinct_count_gte: 2}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [multi_source_confirmed]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "indicator confirmed by >=2 source products within 1h"}
  - id: corr-005-threat-intel-and-local-hit
    enabled: true
    name: Threat intel hit with local recurrence
    match: {all: [{field: threat_intel.matched, equals: true}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, ip_address, file_hash, domain.name]
    lookback: 24h
    threshold: {count_gte: 2}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [intel_backed_recurrence]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "threat intel match repeated locally within 24h"}
  - id: corr-006-privileged-account-involved
    enabled: true
    name: Privileged identity involved in alert
    match: {any: [{field: identity.is_privileged, equals: true}, {field: identity.role_tier, in: [admin, privileged, break_glass]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, user_id]
    lookback: 24h
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 2
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [privileged_identity]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "privileged identity involved"}
  - id: corr-007-critical-asset-targeted
    enabled: true
    name: Critical asset targeted
    match: {any: [{field: asset.criticality, in: [high, critical]}, {field: asset.tags, contains_any: [crown_jewel, domain_controller, identity_provider, security_tooling]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, host_id]
    lookback: 24h
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [critical_asset]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "alert on critical asset"}
  - id: corr-008-ransomware-behavior-chain
    enabled: true
    name: Ransomware behavior chain on same host
    match: {any: [{field: tactic, in: [impact]}, {field: technique, in: [T1486, T1490]}, {field: process_name, in: [vssadmin.exe, wbadmin.exe, bcdedit.exe]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, host_id]
    lookback: 1h
    threshold: {count_gte: 2}
    actions:
      severity_set: critical
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [ransomware_chain]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "ransomware-related behaviors chained on same host"}
  - id: corr-009-lateral-movement-pattern
    enabled: true
    name: Lateral movement pattern across hosts
    match: {any: [{field: user_id, exists: true}, {field: ip_address, exists: true}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, user_id, ip_address]
    lookback: 1h
    threshold: {distinct_field: host_id, distinct_count_gte: 3}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 2
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [lateral_movement_suspected]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "same user or source IP linked to >=3 hosts in 1h"}
  - id: corr-010-case-linked-repeat-alert
    enabled: true
    name: Alert linked to active case with repeat activity
    match: {all: [{field: case_id, exists: true}, {field: case.status, in: [open, in_progress, containment_pending]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, case_id, host_id, user_id, ip_address]
    lookback: 7d
    threshold: {count_gte: 2}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [active_case_recurrence]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "entity already linked to active case and repeated"}
  - id: corr-011-sandbox-malicious-verdict
    enabled: true
    name: Malicious sandbox verdict
    match: {all: [{field: sandbox.verdict, equals: malicious}, {field: file_hash, exists: true}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, file_hash]
    lookback: 30d
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    actions:
      severity_set: critical
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [sandbox_confirmed_malware]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "sandbox malicious verdict for observed file hash"}
  - id: corr-012-external-exposure-plus-compromise
    enabled: true
    name: Internet-exposed asset with compromise indicators
    match:
      all:
        - {field: asset.exposure, in: [internet_facing, dmz]}
        - any:
            - {field: tactic, in: [execution, persistence, command-and-control]}
            - {field: threat_intel.matched, equals: true}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, host_id]
    lookback: 24h
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 2
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [exposed_asset_compromise]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "internet-facing asset with compromise indicators"}
  - id: corr-013-same-hash-multiple-hosts
    enabled: true
    name: Same suspicious file hash across multiple hosts
    match: {all: [{field: file_hash, exists: true}, {field: file.reputation, in: [suspicious, malicious, unknown]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, file_hash]
    lookback: 4h
    threshold: {distinct_field: host_id, distinct_count_gte: 3}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 2
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [multi_host_hash_spread]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "same suspicious hash observed on >=3 hosts in 4h"}
  - id: corr-014-offhours-privileged-auth
    enabled: true
    name: Off-hours privileged authentication anomaly
    match: {all: [{field: identity.is_privileged, equals: true}, {field: event.category, in: [authentication, iam]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, user_id]
    lookback: 12h
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    conditions:
      time_window: {timezone_field: tenant.timezone, outside_business_hours: 19:00-06:00}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [offhours_privileged_activity]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "privileged auth alert outside business hours"}
  - id: corr-015-suppression-known-maintenance
    enabled: true
    name: Suppress severity uplift during approved maintenance
    match: {all: [{field: asset.maintenance_window.active, equals: true}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, host_id]
    lookback: 1h
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    actions:
      suppress_uplift: true
      add_tags: [maintenance_window_active]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "approved maintenance window active"}
rule_order: [corr-015-suppression-known-maintenance, corr-006-privileged-account-involved, corr-007-critical-asset-targeted, corr-008-ransomware-behavior-chain, corr-011-sandbox-malicious-verdict, corr-012-external-exposure-plus-compromise, corr-009-lateral-movement-pattern, corr-013-same-hash-multiple-hosts, corr-004-multi-source-confirmation, corr-005-threat-intel-and-local-hit, corr-001-repeat-host-high-volume, corr-002-repeat-user-auth-failures, corr-003-host-and-user-linked, corr-010-case-linked-repeat-alert, corr-014-offhours-privileged-auth]
output_mutations:
  set_fields: [alert.severity, alert.confidence, alert.tags, alert.correlation.reason, alert.correlation.rule_id, alert.correlation.lookback, alert.correlation.scope]
  preserve_fields: [tenant_id, correlation_id, source_type, source_product, original_severity, original_confidence]

  topic: audit.events
  event_name: enrichment.severity_correlation.applied
  include: [tenant_id, alert_id, correlation_id, actor, source_ip, previous_severity, new_severity, rule_id, timestamp]
validation:
  require_unique_rule_ids: true
  require_enabled_boolean: true
  require_threshold_on_all_rules: true
  reject_unknown_severity_values: true

    match: {any: [{field: user_id, exists: true}, {field: ip_address, exists: true}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, user_id, ip_address]
    lookback: 1h
    threshold: {distinct_field: host_id, distinct_count_gte: 3}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 2
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [lateral_movement_suspected]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "same user or source IP linked to >=3 hosts in 1h"}
  - id: corr-010-case-linked-repeat-alert
    enabled: true
    name: Alert linked to active case with repeat activity
    match: {all: [{field: case_id, exists: true}, {field: case.status, in: [open, in_progress, containment_pending]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, case_id, host_id, user_id, ip_address]
    lookback: 7d
    threshold: {count_gte: 2}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [active_case_recurrence]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "entity already linked to active case and repeated"}
  - id: corr-011-sandbox-malicious-verdict
    enabled: true
    name: Malicious sandbox verdict
    match: {all: [{field: sandbox.verdict, equals: malicious}, {field: file_hash, exists: true}]}

    lookback: 30d
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    actions:
      severity_set: critical
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [sandbox_confirmed_malware]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "sandbox malicious verdict for observed file hash"}
  - id: corr-012-external-exposure-plus-compromise
    enabled: true
    name: Internet-exposed asset with compromise indicators
    match:
      all:

    lookback: 24h
    threshold: {count_gte: 1}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 2
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [exposed_asset_compromise]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "internet-facing asset with compromise indicators"}
  - id: corr-013-same-hash-multiple-hosts
    enabled: true
    name: Same suspicious file hash across multiple hosts
    match: {all: [{field: file_hash, exists: true}, {field: file.reputation, in: [suspicious, malicious, unknown]}]}
    correlate_on: [tenant_id, file_hash]
    lookback: 4h
    threshold: {distinct_field: host_id, distinct_count_gte: 3}
    actions:
      severity_uplift: 2
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [multi_host_hash_spread]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "same suspicious hash observed on >=3 hosts in 4h"}
  - id: corr-014-offhours-privileged-auth
    enabled: true
    name: Off-hours privileged authentication anomaly
    match: {all: [{field: identity.is_privileged, equals: true}, {field: event.category, in: [authentication, iam]}]}

      severity_uplift: 1
      confidence_set: high
      add_tags: [offhours_privileged_activity]
      annotate: {correlation_reason: "privileged auth alert outside business hours"}

    enabled: true

      suppress_uplift: true

service: case-management-api
config_type: investigation-playbook
playbook_id: phishing-triage-and-escalation
name: Phishing Alert Triage and Escalation
description: Analyst triage, evidence collection, escalation, and approved response actions for phishing-related alerts in SentinelOps.
updated_at: 2026-03-20T09:22:00Z
owner_team: soc-engineering
enabled: true
applies_to:
  alert_categories: [phishing, email-threat, credential-harvest, malicious-link, malicious-attachment]
  sources: [secure-email-gateway, edr, siem, user-report]
  minimum_severity: low
case_defaults:
  queue: email-security
  priority_mapping: {low: P4, medium: P3, high: P2, critical: P1}
  case_type: phishing-investigation
  initial_status: triage
  assignment_strategy: round_robin
  sla_targets: {acknowledge_minutes: 15, triage_complete_minutes: 60, containment_start_minutes: 120}
  tags: [phishing, email, analyst-playbook]
evidence_requirements:
  required_on_case_creation: [alert_id, tenant_id, source, source_event_time, recipient_email, sender_email, subject]
  collect_if_available: [message_id, internet_headers, urls, attachment_hashes, attachment_names, mailbox_message_trace, endpoint_hostname, user_id, identity_provider_events, proxy_click_logs, sandbox_report]
  artifact_storage:
    upload_bucket_class: forensic-artifacts
    staging_path: /var/lib/sentinelops/forensics/staging
    legal_hold_supported: true
severity_logic:
  default: medium
  uplift_rules:
    - id: exec-targeted
      when:
        any:
          - {field: recipient_role, op: in, value: [executive, finance, privileged-admin]}
          - {field: vip_user, op: eq, value: true}
      set: {severity: high, confidence: high, add_tags: [vip-target]}
    - id: credential-harvest-confirmed
      when:
        all:
          - {field: phishing_type, op: eq, value: credential-harvest}
          - {field: user_clicked, op: eq, value: true}
          - {field: login_submitted, op: eq, value: true}
      set: {severity: critical, confidence: high, add_tags: [account-compromise-risk]}
    - id: malware-attachment-opened
      when:
        all:
          - {field: attachment_malicious, op: eq, value: true}
          - {field: attachment_opened, op: eq, value: true}
      set: {severity: critical, confidence: high, add_tags: [malware-execution-risk]}
    - id: broad-campaign
      when: {field: recipient_count, op: gte, value: 10}
      set: {severity: high, add_tags: [campaign]}
prechecks:
  require_alert_document: true
  require_audit_context: true
  require_case_db_write: true
  require_opensearch_lookup: true
  require_actor_identity: true
  fail_closed_on_missing_tenant_mapping: true
workflow:
  - step_id: validate-alert-context
    name: Validate alert and tenant context
    type: system
    action: validate_alert_envelope
    timeout_seconds: 30
    on_success: fetch-related-telemetry
    on_failure: manual-review-required
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: fetch-related-telemetry
    name: Pull related telemetry and historical context
    type: system
    action: query_context_sources
    inputs:
      opensearch_index: sentinelops-sec-events
      lookups: [recent_same_sender, recent_same_url, recent_same_attachment_hash, user_click_activity, endpoint_alerts_24h, identity_events_24h]
    timeout_seconds: 90
    on_success: create-or-link-case
    on_failure: create-or-link-case
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: create-or-link-case
    name: Create new case or link to existing campaign case
    type: system
    action: create_or_merge_case
    inputs:
      database: sentinelops_core
      merge_keys: [tenant_id, sender_email, subject, message_id, primary_url]
      merge_window_hours: 24
    outputs: {case_id: case_id}
    on_success: analyst-triage
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: analyst-triage
    name: Analyst triage checklist
    type: analyst_task
    instructions:
      - Confirm whether the message is malicious, suspicious, benign, or spam-only.
      - Review sender reputation, authentication results, impersonation indicators, URLs, attachments, and user interaction.
      - Check for similar alerts across the tenant and record disposition with rationale.
    required_fields: [disposition, phishing_type, user_interaction, analyst_summary]
    allowed_values:
      disposition: [malicious, suspicious, benign, false_positive]
      phishing_type: [credential-harvest, malware-delivery, business-email-compromise, spam, unknown]
      user_interaction: [none, opened, clicked, replied, credentials_submitted]
    on_success:
      malicious: assess-impact
      suspicious: assess-impact
      benign: close-benign
      false_positive: close-false-positive
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: assess-impact
    name: Assess user and tenant impact
    type: analyst_task
    instructions:
      - Identify recipients, delivery status, credential exposure, endpoint execution, privileged users, and legal hold need.
    required_fields: [impacted_recipients, privileged_accounts_impacted, credentials_at_risk, malware_execution_suspected, legal_hold_required]
    on_success: approval-gate
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: approval-gate
    name: Approval gate for containment actions
    type: approval
    approval_policy:
      required: true
      approver_roles: [tenant_admin, incident_commander, senior_analyst]
      require_reason: true
      max_wait_minutes: 30
    on_approved: execute-approved-actions
    on_rejected: monitor-only
    on_timeout: monitor-only
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: execute-approved-actions
    name: Execute approved phishing containment actions
    type: automation
    service: response-automation
    kafka_topic: automation.requests
    allowed_actions:
      - {action_id: search-and-purge-email, description: Remove matching malicious messages from mailboxes, requires_fields: [message_id, tenant_id]}
      - {action_id: disable-user-account, description: Disable account if compromise is confirmed or highly likely, requires_fields: [user_id, tenant_id]}
      - {action_id: revoke-active-sessions, description: Revoke active sessions and refresh tokens, requires_fields: [user_id, tenant_id]}
      - {action_id: force-password-reset, description: Force password reset and MFA re-registration if policy allows, requires_fields: [user_id, tenant_id]}
      - {action_id: isolate-host, description: Isolate endpoint if malware execution is suspected, requires_fields: [endpoint_hostname, tenant_id]}
      - {action_id: block-url-domain, description: Push URL or domain block to supported controls, requires_fields: [primary_url, tenant_id]}
      - {action_id: notify-ticketing, description: Create or update enterprise ticket, requires_fields: [case_id, tenant_id]}
    timeout_seconds: 300
    on_success: post-actions-validation
    on_failure: escalation-required
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: post-actions-validation
    name: Validate containment and document outcome
    type: analyst_task
    instructions:
      - Confirm automation results, purge status, account or host actions, and final impact.
    required_fields: [containment_status, residual_risk, user_notification_required]
    on_success: escalate-or-close
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: escalation-required
    name: Escalate to incident response
    type: system
    action: escalate_case
    inputs:
      target_queue: incident-response
      reason_template: Automation failure or elevated phishing impact requires IR handling
      set_case_status: escalated
    on_success: notify-stakeholders
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: monitor-only
    name: Monitor only and continue investigation
    type: analyst_task
    instructions:
      - Document why containment was not approved, increase monitoring, and reassess on new evidence.
    required_fields: [monitoring_plan, approval_outcome_reason]
    on_success: notify-stakeholders
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: notify-stakeholders
    name: Notify stakeholders
    type: automation
    service: response-automation
    kafka_topic: automation.requests
    allowed_actions:
      - {action_id: send-email-notification}
      - {action_id: create-ticket}
      - {action_id: post-chatops-message}
    inputs: {notification_template: phishing-investigation-update}
    on_success: escalate-or-close
    on_failure: escalate-or-close
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: escalate-or-close
    name: Determine final routing
    type: decision
    rules:
      - when: {field: residual_risk, op: in, value: [high, critical]}
        next_step: handoff-to-ir
      - when: {field: credentials_at_risk, op: eq, value: true}
        next_step: handoff-to-ir
      - when: {field: malware_execution_suspected, op: eq, value: true}
        next_step: handoff-to-ir
    default_next_step: close-malicious
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: handoff-to-ir
    name: Handoff to incident response
    type: system
    action: escalate_case
    inputs:
      target_queue: incident-response
      set_case_status: escalated
      preserve_evidence: true
    on_success: end
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: close-benign
    name: Close as benign
    type: system
    action: close_case
    inputs: {resolution: benign, set_alert_state: closed}
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: close-false-positive
    name: Close as false positive
    type: system
    action: close_case
    inputs: {resolution: false_positive, set_alert_state: closed, feedback_to_detection: true}
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: close-malicious
    name: Close as malicious and contained
    type: system
    action: close_case
    inputs: {resolution: malicious_contained, set_alert_state: resolved}
    writes_audit: true
  - step_id: manual-review-required
    name: Manual review required
    type: analyst_task
    instructions:
      - Validate tenant mapping, source integrity, and alert normalization; continue manually and open a platform issue if needed.
    required_fields: [review_notes]
    writes_audit: true
audit:
  immutable_events_topic: audit.events
  required_fields: [actor, timestamp, source_ip, correlation_id, tenant_id, case_id, playbook_id]
  emit_on: [playbook_started, step_started, step_completed, approval_requested, approval_granted, approval_rejected, automation_requested, automation_completed, case_escalated, case_closed]
search_annotations:
  timeline_labels: [phishing, email, containment, escalation]
  indexed_fields: [sender_email, recipient_email, subject, message_id, primary_url, attachment_hashes, disposition, case_id]
rbac:
  allowed_roles: [soc_analyst, senior_analyst, incident_commander, tenant_admin]
  restricted_actions:
    disable-user-account: {roles: [senior_analyst, incident_commander, tenant_admin]}
    isolate-host: {roles: [senior_analyst, incident_commander]}
    force-password-reset: {roles: [senior_analyst, incident_commander, tenant_admin]}
integrations:
  dependencies: [keycloak, postgresql, opensearch, kafka, minio]
  external_connectors: [email-security, identity-provider, edr, ticketing, threat-intel]
